message:
The other day, I had one of those smug "I told you so" moments that actually felt pretty good. My husband had been rolling his eyes at me for weeks about my insistence on checking our smoke alarms and reviewing our escape plan. "We’re fine!" he said, laughing it off. 

But wouldn’t you know it, while I was making dinner, the smoke detector went off because I was a little too ambitious with the sautéing! Instead of panic, I was ready. We calmly practiced our escape plan, and I felt a wave of relief knowing we had a safe route figured out. 

It’s funny how those little reminders can turn into proud moments. It’s all about being prepared, right? Have you ever had a moment like that where your prep paid off? 

P.S. I found this little refresher helpful!
